scripts.test: bun run test:unit && bun run test:e2e
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run format:check && bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run check:rust
scripts.check:ci: bun run check && bun run check:bundle && bun run check:schema && bun run check:docs && bun run check:security && bun run check:actions
scripts.typecheck: bun scripts/ci/run-compact-command.ts --label typecheck -- bun node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --noEmit --pretty false --checkers 4
scripts.check:rust: bun run check:rust:fmt && bun run check:rust:clippy
scripts.check:rust:fmt: bun scripts/ci/run-compact-command.ts --label rust:fmt --cwd src-tauri -- cargo fmt -p RapidRAW -- --check
scripts.check:rust:clippy: bun scripts/ci/run-compact-command.ts --label rust:clippy --cwd src-tauri -- cargo clippy --locked --all-targets --no-default-features --features required-ci -- -D warnings -W clippy::redundant_clone
scripts.check:bundle: bun run build && bun tests/integration/checks/check-vite-product-bundle-guard.ts && bun tests/integration/checks/check-vite-production-payload.ts && bun tests/integration/checks/check-vite-bundle-budget.ts && bun scripts/ci/generate-vite-bundle-report.ts && git archive --format=zip --output=artifacts/bundle-report/rapidraw-source.zip HEAD
scripts.check:schema: bun scripts/ci/run-compact-command.ts --label schema:types -- bun node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p packages/rawengine-schema/tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false --checkers 4 && bun packages/rawengine-schema/scripts/check-samples.ts && bun packages/rawengine-schema/scripts/check-sample-artifacts.ts && bun packages/rawengine-schema/scripts/check-edit-graph-migrations.ts && bun tests/integration/checks/check-schema-production-boundary.ts && bun packages/rawengine-schema/scripts/check-edit-command-bus.ts && bun scripts/checks/ci/check-schema-contract-gate.ts
scripts.check:docs: bun scripts/ci/run-compact-command.ts --label docs:format -- biome ci --linter-enabled=false --assist-enabled=false docs && bun tests/integration/checks/check-markdown-links.ts
scripts.check:security: bun scripts/ci/run-compact-command.ts --label security:js -- bun audit --audit-level moderate && bun tests/integration/checks/check-rust-advisory-waivers.ts && bun scripts/ci/run-compact-command.ts --label security:rust --cwd src-tauri -- cargo audit --ignore RUSTSEC-2024-0429 --ignore RUSTSEC-2026-0194 --ignore RUSTSEC-2026-0195
